prompt: FIXED SUBJECT. The attached image is a locked foreground layer. Mask and lock every pixel of the woman and her entire dress: her face, expression, skin, hair, arms; the cream ditsy-floral cotton dress with white lace-trimmed flutter sleeves and neckline, shirred waist and full midi skirt; her shoes, bracelet and jewelry. Reproduce all of that EXACTLY and identically — do not redraw, recolor, restyle, re-pattern, resize or move it, and do not 'clean up' the floral print. Inpaint ONLY the background outside the locked subject. Preserve the original framing; do not crop. Match the new background's light direction and warmth to the light already on her so it composites naturally. Scene: sunny south-of-France village cafe — peach/apricot plaster facade, sage-green shutters, wrought-iron wall lantern, climbing greenery, cream wrought-iron bistro chairs and round table on cobblestones. Soft even, slightly warm light; she gazes off to the left in profile.
